mnemonics: CARES: Coefficients Are Related to Entropy and Scale
Odd Ratios: One Direction, Odds are Inversed
keyPoints: The coefficient of a feature is related to the variance of that feature and the total variance of the data.
The odd ratio is the ratio of the odds of an event occurring in one group versus another group.
The sign of the coefficient indicates the direction of the effect, and the magnitude indicates the strength of the effect.
